title: Crispy Romantic Indian Pinto Beans Bowl
description: A heart‑warming bowl of spiced, crispy pinto beans garnished with fresh cilantro, lime, and a touch of mango pickle, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add mustard seeds and hing; let them sizzle for a few seconds until the seeds pop.
Add sliced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until the onion becomes translucent and fragrant.
Stir in tomato paste, garam masala, turmeric, and cumin; cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked pinto beans and mix to coat them evenly with the spice mixture; reduce heat to low, cover, and let the beans steam for 5 minutes.
Uncover, increase heat to medium, and stir‑fry the beans for 5–7 minutes until they begin to crisp up, shaking the pan occasionally to prevent sticking.
Season with salt, then fold in chopped cilantro.
Serve the beans in bowls, garnish with toasted almonds if desired, add a handful of chopped mango pickle, and squeeze fresh lime over each portion.
